long.text: sala Jahangir ne Hint ko itna zayada pehle hi game mein thaka deya tha ke un ki tawanai mein kami nazar ane lagi thi Hint apne harifon ko thaka ker harane mein mashhoor they lakin iss roze woh khud shikar ho rahe they yeh umda mansooba bandi ka nateja tha Jahangir ne pehla game iss andaz mein khela

yar such me ye chiz kamal he pehle mujhy lga k me ne apne paise waste kiye hin laikin ye wakai me zabardast he.heart rate sensor is percent ok and step counter is not that good but i will give it stars. aur han aik smart phone se connect karo tb hi percent faida uta sako ge

Mohammad Hafeez: Bihat ziyadah afsos hota hai, hum guzishta kai baras se mushkil halat mein kheel rahe hain, is doran kai masail ka samna karna para, baz tanaziyat se mutasir mulki cricket ka waqar bahal ho chukka hai, ab international cricket bahal ho jaye to awam ko bhi matches se lutf andoz hone

Phir November ko president George Bush ne American sifaratkari ke aeham tareen mansab " Secretary of Estate " ke liye inhe namzad kar diya, taqriban maah bad jab us mansab par taqriri ki tauseeq ke liye senate ke arkaan ki raaey shumari hui to centers ne rice ke haq mein aur ne in ke khilaaf vote di

Iss azeem hasti ka nam Jahangir Khan tha jis ne Hint ko Squash ko khair bad kahne per majboor ker deya Jahangir ki kahani iss fateh alam ki kahani hai jo apni na qabil yaqeen salahyaton ki bunyad per bagai ruke jadoo jagata raha unhein Squash ka Sikender E Azam bhi kaha ja sakta hai jis ke samne koi

Ajj Pakistan kay alawa Islami duniya mein bhi Edhi nay aik ghar khudgharz aur muhtarma shaks kay tour sherat pai hai shurat aur izat kay bawud inhone apni sada zindagi ko tarak nahi kiya woh sada rawati Pakistani libas pehante hain jo sirf aik ya do din in ki mumlikat hai iske alawa in ki malkiyat k

June ko ulma ke aik wafad se baat chet karte hoye Wazir e Azam Shaukat Aziz ne kha ke qanon ki hukumrani yaqini banana hukumat ki zimedari hai, masher se boraiyon ke khatme aur awam ko insaf ki fari aur sasti farhami ko yaqini banane ke leye hum kaam kar rahe hain
